rationale: Tier A from the corpus is EMPTY (see the campaign report's central finding: no corpus workflow both fails and succeeds on constructible webhook input, so the full 30-success bar is unreachable). The live subset therefore ships STANDING GUARDS only: 10 of the 17 locally probe-verified workflows, smallest-payload-first to minimize instance clutter. Each gets ~5-7 real executions (baseline 3 + apply + routed probe); all are deactivated after proving, so zero Cloud active slots stay consumed. The n=1 dogfood workflow remains the only full-bar case.
